prompt: Franciscan ministers in Ireland seek your counsel: how can strict poverty, preaching, and obedience to bishops remain united amid political pressure?

options.text: Back disciplined poverty with clear obedience to bishop and papal teaching.
options.response: You uphold Franciscan poverty as evangelical witness within full Catholic obedience.

options.text: Send trained confessors and preachers to storm-struck ports immediately.
options.response: You dispatch confessors and preachers, pairing doctrine with corporal works of mercy.

options.text: Draft a chapter memorandum citing Bonaventure on unity and charity.
options.response: Your memorandum ties reform to charity, fraternity, and sacramental fidelity.
